text.title: tree-testing Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns repeatedly observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Test tree includes section icons; users navigate by symbol, not label; IA quality hidden.
antipattern.root-cause: Author exported live nav including icons.
antipattern.fix: Strip all visual content; verify text-only-tree rule before fielding.

antipattern.symptom: Report claims 85% success rate; reanalysis shows half required backtracking.
antipattern.fix: Mandate directness + first-click metrics; reanalyse historical data.

antipattern.symptom: 6-level tree; success rate <30% on critical tasks; team blames test instead of IA.
antipattern.fix: Cap at 4 levels; refactor or split before test.

antipattern.symptom: Comparative test with 12 users per arm; team picks B over A on noise.
antipattern.root-cause: Sample size dictated by budget, not power calc.
antipattern.fix: Pre-calc required n (≥30 per arm); cut tasks rather than n.
